title: Custom Totem Pop Animation
description: Change how the totem pop animation looks without the hassle of using texture packs!
body:
## This is a simple mod to customize how your on-screen totem pop animation looks.

Current feature list is as follows:
- Change the scale of the totem
- Change the position of the totem on your screen
- Change how long the totem is on screen
- Replace the totem with any other in-game item

This is compatible with all resource packs

This mod requires midnightlib to be configured.
